productDisplayName: Peter England Men Elements Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet holder from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic piece.Dimensions: 11.9 cm X 9.3 cmHas two main compartmentsThree credit card slots on the  left side of the walletTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideButtoned pocket on the rightContrast leather piping for styleBranding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
